common_names_val: Bleeding Heart, Old-fashioned Bleeding Heart, Venus's Car, Lyre பூ
variety_val: Pink (classic), Alba (white), Gold Heart (golden foliage), Valentine (red)
growth_habit_val: Clump-forming மூலிகைaceous பல்லாண்டு with arching தண்டுs; goes dormant in suமி.மீer heat
leaves_val: Compound, deeply dissected, fern-like, blue-green to grey-green, 30–40 செ.மீ long
flowers_val: Heart-shaped, pendant, 2–3 செ.மீ long, borne in arching racemes of 3–15 பூs
flower_char_val: Outer petals pink or white forming the heart shape; inner petals white, protruding like a drop; zygomorphic syமி.மீetry
fruit_val: Elongated capsule, 3–4 செ.மீ long, splitting open when ripe to release விதைகள்
seed_char_val: Small, round, black, shiny விதைகள் with elaiosomes (ant-dispersed); require cold stratification for germination
root_system_val: Fleshy, brittle rhizomatous வேர் syதண்டு; spreads sகுறைவுly to form clumps
climate_val: மிதவெப்ப; thrives in cool, moist conditions; USDA zones 3–9
temp_range_val: 10–24°C ideal; tolerates winter cold to −40°C when dormant; goes dormant above 30°C
soil_type_val: Humus-rich, நல்ல வடிகால், moist களிமண் மண் with அதிகம் இயற்கை matter
sun_req_val: பகுதி நிழல் to full நிழல்; morning சூரியன் with afterஇல்லைon நிழல் ideal
irrigation_val: சொட்டு நீர்ப்பாசனம் or gentle நீர்ing at மண் level; avoid wetting foliage
water_req_val: மிதமான; keep மண் consistently moist but never நீர்logged
can_pots_val: ஆம், in large containers (15+ liters) with good drainage; bring indoors in extreme heat
fert_schedule_val: Once in early spring as new growth emerges; light feeding monthly during active growth
organic_fert_val: கம்போஸ்ட், இலை mold, well-rotted manure, balanced இயற்கை உரம் (10-10-10)
organic_pest_val: வேப்ப எண்ணெய் for aphids; slug pellets or beer traps for slugs and snails
mulching_val: 5–8 செ.மீ இயற்கை மல்ச் (இலை mold, பட்டை chips) to retain moisture and keep வேர்s cool
training_val: இல்லை training needed; naturally forms graceful arching mounds
pruning_time_val: After foliage yelகுறைவுs and dies back naturally in suமி.மீer; cut to ground level in autumn
how_prune_val: Remove spent பூ தண்டுs to encourage reblooming; cut back yelகுறைவுed foliage to ground level
common_pests_val: Aphids, slugs, snails; generally very பூச்சி-resistant
common_diseases_val: Fusarium wilt, verticillium wilt, powdery mildew, தண்டு rot in நீர்logged conditions
disease_prev_val: Ensure good drainage, avoid overhead நீர்ing, provide air circulation, remove infected foliage promptly
flowering_months_val: April–June (spring to early suமி.மீer); may rebloom in cool autumns
fruiting_season_val: Late spring to early suமி.மீer; capsules mature 4–6 weeks after பூing
days_harvest_val: Cut பூs when 3–4 blooms are open on the raceme for best vase life
harvest_ind_val: பூs fully colored and pendant; விதை capsules turn brown when ripe
avg_yield_val: 10–20 பூing தண்டுs per mature clump per season
poll_notes_val: Long-tongued bumblebees are the primary pollinators; பூ shape excludes most other insects
poll_details_val: Bumblebees pry open the heart-shaped petals to access nectar; விதைகள் have elaiosomes for ant dispersal (myrmecochory)
prop_seeds_val: Requires 4–6 weeks cold stratification at 4°C; sow in autumn outdoors or stratify in refrigerator; germination in 30–90 days
prop_cuttings_val: வேர் cuttings in late autumn (5–8 செ.மீ sections); தண்டு cuttings in spring after new growth emerges
prop_grafting_val: Division of rhizomes in early spring or autumn is the most reliable method; divide every 3–4 years
symbolism_val: Symbolizes unconditional love, compassion, and romantic devotion; in Asian folklore, associated with unrequited love and the story of a prince who won a maiden's heart
traditional_val: Cultivated in Chinese and ஜப்பான்ese gardens for centuries as an ornamental; featured in Victorian cottage gardens; popular in நிழல் garden design worldwide
trad_medicine_val: Used in traditional Chinese medicine for treating bruises, traumatic injuries, and menstrual irregularities
active_compounds_val: Contains isoquiஇல்லைline alkaloids including protopine, sanguinarine, and allocryptopine
antiinflam_val: Alkaloid extracts show anti-inflaமி.மீatory and analgesic activity in traditional preparations
caution_val: All parts of the plant are toxic if ingested; can cause skin irritation on contact; keep away from children and pets
